blocks.content: The venue was red. Not accent-red — red the way a decision is. Gold lanterns, double happiness symbols on every surface, chrysanthemums in vases Kit couldn't name the meaning of.
He stood at the entrance and felt Daisy squeeze his hand.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit. You're doing the face.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What face.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: The one where you're framing everything.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I just want to remember it.
Savannah appeared in a borrowed qipao — a cousin's — and wore it like she'd been wearing it her whole life.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: You look incredible.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Where did you even get that.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Meilin's cousin. We're the same size. It was meant to be.
Then Eli came out. Navy tangzhuang, gold buttons.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: He looks good.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Don't tell him that.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: Why not.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: He'll never stop talking about it.
Meilin crossed the room to him. She was in red — qipao, gold embroidery at the collar and cuffs, hair up. She reached up and adjusted his collar.

blocks.speaker: Meilin
blocks.content: 你今天很好看。

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You're going to make me forget everything I practiced.

blocks.speaker: Meilin
blocks.content: Then forget it. Just be here.
He was.
